acceptance_targets: [ch10_craft_001] Reading the revised passage anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:167, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:211, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:257, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:293, a reviewer can state before or immediately after the kiss whether the mother shelf is secured or deliberately left vulnerable, and the text supplies at least one concrete physical consequence or verification beat tied to that choice.

[ch10_prose_001] In the revised passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:93, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:209, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:241, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:345, no more than two standalone negation/correction fragment beats remain, and adjacent emphasis beats do not reuse the same sentence shape.

[ch10_prose_002] In the revised ending anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:345 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:367, the chapter closes on a concrete sensory or behavioral image that implies the altered trust and the ledger's danger without directly stating the body/book analogy or summarizing Silas's lesson in abstract terms.

[FBR-006] Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3844 no longer uses an abstract landing phrase and the beat is conveyed through embodied reaction; fail if the prose still steps outside the scene to certify the effect.

findings.acceptance_test: Reading the revised passage anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:167, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:211, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:257, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:293, a reviewer can state before or immediately after the kiss whether the mother shelf is secured or deliberately left vulnerable, and the text supplies at least one concrete physical consequence or verification beat tied to that choice.
findings.evidence: The propagation-shed jeopardy is established at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:167 and worked in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:171, but the scene pivots into sex at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:257 and then into the ledger reveal at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:293 without a concrete beat confirming whether the fever stripe is contained or what pausing costs.
findings.problem: Once desire peaks, the chapter lets the mother-shelf emergency fall out of view. That weakens the competence-driven seduction the chapter spine calls for and makes the erotic turn feel partially detached from the practical danger that was energizing the room.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the transition around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:211, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:217, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:257, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:293 so the reader knows whether Inez has stabilized the shelf before the kiss or whether both characters knowingly choose to leave it at risk. If the work is finished, show the exact physical sign of containment; if it is interrupted, show the cost or risk calculation on the page before the ledger comes out.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:93, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:209, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:241, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:345, no more than two standalone negation/correction fragment beats remain, and adjacent emphasis beats do not reuse the same sentence shape.
findings.evidence: The chapter repeats the same negation/correction fragment shape at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:93, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:209, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:227, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:241, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:345.
findings.problem: The recurring 'Not X. Not Y. Z.' and related correction-fragment rhythm reads as a chapter-level tic rather than pressure-sensitive variation. By the later repetitions, emphasis has turned into formula and the prose starts sounding pre-shaped instead of discovered in scene.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the sentence architecture in the cluster around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:93, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:209, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:227, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:241, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:345. Keep no more than two standalone negation-fragment beats in those passages and recast the rest as full syntactic turns, concrete sensory follow-through, or differently shaped emphasis.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised ending anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:345 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:367, the chapter closes on a concrete sensory or behavioral image that implies the altered trust and the ledger's danger without directly stating the body/book analogy or summarizing Silas's lesson in abstract terms.
findings.evidence: The narration explains its own symbolic architecture at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:217, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:345, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:367.
findings.problem: Several late lines translate the body/work/ledger braid into abstract thesis instead of trusting the scene's residue. That explanatory pressure softens the ending's power: the reader is told what the book and the sex mean at the moment when concrete aftermath would hit harder.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the explanatory lines at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:217, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:345, and especially snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:367. Replace direct symbolic equivalence with observable aftermath: how Silas handles the ledger, what detail from the pages won't leave him, how Inez's trust changes his behavior, or what bodily residue makes the gift feel riskier.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3844 no longer uses an abstract landing phrase and the beat is conveyed through embodied reaction; fail if the prose still steps outside the scene to certify the effect.
findings.problem: Full-book explanatory hinge pattern ('There it was' / 'That landed') appears in 13 chapters. At 3844 the narration inserts a tiny abstract landing cue just when the shed scene should stay wholly in body, heat, and risk.
findings.rewrite_direction: REPLACE the hinge at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3844 with a physical response line specific to Silas in that room: breath, balance, skin, or the altered handling of the lamp/table. Keep the scene inside erotic and strategic pressure rather than summarizing it.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the book's strange civic biology, vulgar humor, erotic consequence, and class abrasion. When a choice appears between the cleaner version and the truer, messier one, choose the messier version so long as causality and character truth remain exact. Treat the city's slime, smell, heat, and appetite as part of the novel's beauty rather than embarrassment to be polished away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, shame, hunger, class humiliation, bodily mess, or economic pressure starts drifting into decorous vagueness, rewrite until the scene carries concrete sensory and social cost on the page.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High — contractions are the norm across the novel; uncontracted forms should signal emphasis, class performance, ceremonial language, or Gideon's deliberate control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate crowd scenes with cleanup, ritual with labor, public humiliation with private tenderness, and single-sweep chapters with multi-scene accumulations; no two consecutive chapters should feel built from the same emotional weather, dialogue density, or scene rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Period-aware but not museum-stiff; vivid, bodily, class-conscious, and willing to be ugly or funny without slipping into arch parody or modern snark.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored to Silas Vale for the full novel, with no head-hopping and no neutral historian voice; Inez remains legible through observed action, dialogue, and the objects she shares.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Elastic and pressure-sensitive: quick comic snap in public scenes, thicker sensory accumulation in labor and erotic passages, and hard clean sentences at moments of shame or decision.
